zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel ap Trahaearn於1169年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾時，他的父親Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors40歲，母親Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis49歲。他於1190年與Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1204年在威爾士布雷康史爾格拉斯波利享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel ap Trahaearn于1169年出生在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾时，他的父亲Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors40岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis49岁。他于1190年与Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1204年在威尔士布雷康史爾格拉斯波利享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Trahaearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: composed of the intensive prefix tra- + haearn ‘iron’.

variants.name: Traherne
meanings: Traditional: composed of the intensive prefix tra- + haearn ‘iron’.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel ap Trahaearn was born in 1169, in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors, was 40 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis, was 49. He married Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor in 1190, in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1204, in Glasbury, Breconshire, Wales, at the age of 35.

fr.of, Llanbryn-mair, Montgomeryshire, Wale: Llanbrynmair, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel ap Trahaearn est né en 1169, à Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor en 1190, à Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1204, à Glasbury, Breconshire, Galles, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel ap Trahaearn 1169 in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors 40 und seine Mutter Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis 49. Er hat 1190 in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Glasbury, Breconshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Trahaearn è nato il nel 1169 nel Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor nel 1190, nel Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1204, nel Glasbury, Breconshire, Galles, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Trahaearnが1169年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gorsは40歳，母Gwenllian verch Philip Gwisは49歳であった。1190年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアでNest verch Gruffudd of Dynevorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1204年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアグラスブリーで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Trahaearn(이)가 1169년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1190년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 웨일스 브레콘실르 글라스버이에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Trahaearn nasceu em 1169, em Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor em 1190, em Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1204, em Glasbury, Breconshire, Gales, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel ap Trahaearn родился в 1169 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor в 1190 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1204 г. в местности гласбури, брекуншир, Уэльс в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel ap Trahaearn nació en 1169, en Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor en 1190, en Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1204, en Glasbury, Breconshire, Gales, a la edad de 35 años.
